Home / Services / Website Design Services / Business Website

🌐 Business Website

Get a professionally designed, fully responsive business website that works flawlessly on every device. We build your site with a modern CMS so you can easily update content yourself, integrated contact forms that capture leads directly to your inbox, on-page SEO to help you rank on Google from day one, and an SSL certificate for security and trust. Includes up to 5 custom-designed pages — Home, About, Services, Contact, and one of your choice. Perfect for businesses ready to establish a credible, conversion-focused online presence.

Service Details

Category: Website Design Services

Credits Price: 640 credits (approx. £800)

Turnaround: 5–10 days

How to Book

  1. Create a free account
  2. Purchase credits or subscribe to a plan
  3. Select this service and submit your brief
  4. Receive your completed project within 5–10 days
Book Business Website Now

Related Website Design Services Services

  • Landing Page — High-converting single-page design focused on driving signups, sales, or leads. (240 credits)
  • Sales Funnel — Complete multi-step sales funnel with landing pages, upsells, downsells, and thank-you pages. (480 credits)
  • Brochure Website — Elegant informational website perfect for showcasing your business, portfolio, or services. (400 credits)

Why Choose Creative Kaygency for Business Website?

  • Professional quality at credit-friendly prices
  • Fast turnaround: 5–10 days
  • Satisfaction guarantee with included revisions
  • Track progress from your personal dashboard
  • Save up to 20% by paying with credits
